{{Infobox character
| name = Ragahn
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = First Fisher, leader of the Fisher sect, Truegold
| abilities = sacred artist
| affiliations = Fisher sect
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Ragahn is the leader of the [[Fisher sect]], known as the [[First Fisher]]. He possesses a disheveled appearance similar to a beggar, characterized by stained brown robes, bare feet, and loose gray hair. He carries a net containing bloody dreadbeast remains and an iron hook that is rusted and features an inner blade. As a [[Truegold]], he has achieved total mastery over the [[Remnant]] in his core, though his [[Goldsign]] is so faint that it is nearly unnoticeable to outsiders. Ragahn is noted for his patience and possesses the ability to manipulate forces, such as using an invisible power to move people or descend slowly to the ground. He maintains a disciple named [[Lokk]] and is aware of the approaching presence of the [[Arelius family]].}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|As a member of the [[Fisher sect]], Ragahn eventually rose to become its leader and the [[First Fisher]]. A [[sacred artist]] of the [[Truegold]] stage, he wields a specialized [[Fisher's hook]] constructed from rust-patched iron. Through his progression, he remains a notable example of a [[Fisher]] who has successfully reached the rank of [[Truegold]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Ragahn]] is a member of the [[Fisher sect]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Ragahn]] is the [[First Fisher]] and leader of the [[Fisher sect]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Ragahn]] uses a [[Fisher's hook]] made of rust-patched iron.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Ragahn]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Ragahn]] is a [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Ragahn]] is a [[Fisher]] who reached the [[Truegold]] stage.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|"Send word to your Fisher Ragahn that if we do not share the meal now, none of us will see a crumb."<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Fisher sect]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
